prompts: Cinematic anime realism, luxury cruise engine room with warm warning lights. Kai Harbor, an androgynous passenger in elegant storm-night evening wear with a damp coat, holds a metal panel steady. Jun Marin, an androgynous crew member in a navy uniform with a radio earpiece, uses a repair tool to adjust the panel. Cooperative maintenance, calm focus, no sparks, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous engine room shot, cinematic anime realism. Kai Harbor maintains a firm grip holding the panel steady. Jun Marin completes the final turn of the repair tool, the panel clicks securely into place, and the flickering warm warning lights stabilize to a steady glow. Cooperative team success, no text, no watermark.
